ns0:entry.ns0:title: AndyMik90/Auto-Claude
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/AndyMik90/Auto-Claude
Language: typescript
Autonomous multi-session AI coding

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Anionex/banana-slides
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Anionex/banana-slides
Language: typescript
一个基于nano banana pro🍌的原生AI PPT生成应用，迈向真正的＂Vibe PPT＂; 支持上传任意模板图片；上传任意素材&智能解析；一句话/大纲/页面描述自动生成PPT；口头修改指定区域、一键导出可编辑ppt - An AI-native PPT generator based on nano banana pro🍌

ns0:entry.ns0:title: abhigyanpatwari/GitNexus
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/abhigyanpatwari/GitNexus
Language: typescript
GitNexus: The Zero-Server Code Intelligence Engine - GitNexus is a client-side knowledge graph creator that runs entirely in your browser. Drop in a GitHub repo or ZIP file, and get an interactive knowledge graph wit a built in Graph RAG Agent. Perfect for code exploration

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ailyProject/aily-blockly
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ailyProject/aily-blockly
Language: typescript
AI IDE for hardware development, support Arduino, MicroPython, ESP32, STM32, RP2040, Nrf5x...

ns0:entry.ns0:title: bytebot-ai/bytebot
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/bytebot-ai/bytebot
Language: typescript
Bytebot is a self-hosted AI desktop agent that automates computer tasks through natural language commands, operating within a containerized Linux desktop environment.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: bytedance/UI-TARS-desktop
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/bytedance/UI-TARS-desktop
Language: typescript
The Open-Source Multimodal AI Agent Stack: Connecting Cutting-Edge AI Models and Agent Infra

ns0:entry.ns0:title: bytedance/deer-flow
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/bytedance/deer-flow
Language: typescript
An open-source SuperAgent harness that researches, codes, and creates. With the help of sandboxes, memories, tools, skills and subagents, it handles different levels of tasks that could take minutes to hours.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: code-yeongyu/oh-my-opencode
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/code-yeongyu/oh-my-opencode
Language: typescript
the best agent harness

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dontriskit/awesome-ai-system-prompts
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dontriskit/awesome-ai-system-prompts
Language: typescript
🧠 Curated collection of system prompts for top AI tools. Perfect for AI agent builders and prompt engineers. Incuding: ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Manus, Claude-Code, Loveable, v0, Grok, same new, windsurf, notion, and MetaAI.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/moeru-ai/airi
Language: typescript
💖🧸 Self hosted, you-owned Grok Companion, a container of souls of waifu, cyber livings to bring them into our worlds, wishing to achieve Neuro-sama's altitude. Capable of realtime voice chat, Minecraft, Factorio playing. Web / macOS / Windows supported.

URL: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ruvnet/ruflo
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ruvnet/ruflo
Language: typescript
🌊 The leading agent orchestration platform for Claude. Deploy intelligent multi-agent swarms, coordinate autonomous workflows, and build conversational AI systems. Features enterprise-grade architecture, distributed swarm intelligence, RAG integration, and native Claude Code / Codex Integration
